name: Anhui Quanchai Engine Co., Ltd.
summary: Anhui Quanchai Engine Co., Ltd. researches, develops, manufactures, and sells diesel engines in China, Southeast Asia, Europe, and internationally. Its products include vehicle diesel, low-speed truck diesel, non road diesel, fire fighting/water pump, and generator engines. The company provides diesel engines for automobiles, forklifts, agricultural equipment, construction machineries, and generating sets. Anhui Quanchai Engine Co., Ltd. was founded in 1998 and is based in Chuzhou, China.
